title: KeyPackageReady broadcast happens-after write — the ordering guarantee is essential
description: ws.rs broadcasts KeyPackageReady only after save_key_package() succeeds. This creates a happens-before edge: any GetKeyPackage sent in response to this notification is guaranteed to find the stored data. A contributor might suggest broadcasting immediately (before the await) to reduce latency. Do not do that: the async store write completes asynchronously and a concurrent GetKeyPackage could arrive before the write commits, returning None and silently failing to add the new member.
